assignments.twist: damped driven oscillator with a nonlinear sinusoidal (pendulum) restoring force instead of the linear Hooke term, studied numerically for its resonance characteristics in the nonchaotic regime and compared to the linear case

core_model_summary: A driven, damped simple pendulum, i.e. the harmonic oscillator's forced-and-damped resonance problem generalized to a sinusoidal restoring potential.
